dark.groupbox: color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #232730; border-radius: 12px; background-color: #1a1d26; margin-top: 15px;
dark.buttons: background-color: #3d8bff; color: white; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: bold;
dark.sliders: QSlider::groove:horizontal { background: #232730; height: 6px; } QSlider::handle:horizontal { background: #3d8bff; width: 14px; border-radius: 7px; }

light.groupbox: color: #2f3640; border: 1px solid #dcdde1; border-radius: 12px; background-color: white; margin-top: 15px;
light.sliders: QSlider::groove:horizontal { background: #dcdde1; height: 6px; } QSlider::handle:horizontal { background: #2980b9; width: 14px; border-radius: 7px; }

blue.sliders: QSlider::groove:horizontal { background: #001b36; height: 6px; } QSlider::handle:horizontal { background: #7FDBFF; width: 14px; border-radius: 7px; }
